shirt.translate: рубашка, рубаха, сорочка, блузка, блуза, надевать рубашку
mnemonic: shirt [ше:т] рубашка - Что он (пи-шет) на рубашке.

examples.eng: How does this shirt fit?
Have you ironed my shirt?
Tuck in your shirt.
Your shirt is similar to mine.
This shirt is all worn out.
Does this shirt need ironing?
Jack tucked his shirt in.
This shirt needs washing.
The shirt smelled of perfume.
Which shirt would you choose?
She has a stain on her shirt.
a shirt with black and white stripes
The shirt is made of rayon.
examples.ru: Эта рубашка сделана из искусственного шёлка (вискозы).

examples.eng: This shirt fits just right.
examples.ru: Эта рубашка подходит в самый раз.

examples.eng: Is that shirt loose enough?
She turned the shirt inside out.
This shirt is too creased to wear.
examples.ru: Эта рубашка слишком мятая, чтобы её надевать.

examples.eng: He undid the top buttons of his shirt.
examples.ru: Он расстегнул верхние пуговицы своей рубашки.

examples.eng: He wore a blue shirt open at the neck.
examples.ru: На нём была голубая рубашка с открытым воротом.

examples.eng: Your shirt is drying on the clothesline.
examples.ru: Твоя рубашка сушится на бельевой веревке.

examples.eng: a man in a tattered shirt
Pin the needle to the shirt.
He pulled off his damp shirt.
examples.ru: Он стянул с себя влажную рубашку.

examples.eng: You've creased up my good shirt.
Perspiration dampened his shirt.
His wet shirt clung to his body.
examples.ru: Мокрая рубашка прилипла к его телу.

examples.eng: The label on this shirt itches me.
His shirt was saturated with sweat.
He turned under his shirt's collar.
I threw out that old shirt of yours.
examples.ru: Я выбросила эту твою старую рубашку.
